title: Obsidian-Infused Enderite Armor
description: Adds Obsidian-Infused versions to LieOnLion's Enderite armor.
body:
_An addon for [LieOnLion's Enderite](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderite-lieonlion) which adds armor made from Obsidian-Infused Enderite._

**Pros:**
- Stronger than Enderite.
- Can be repaired with Obsidian.

**Cons:**
- The "Friendly Endermen" feature of the base Enderite armor is now lost. (Lore: The Obsidian drowns out that magic.)
